title: 神秘复兴 Thaumic Renaissance
description: A thaumcraft 6 modpack with almost all the TC6 addons.
body:
A thaumcraft modpack with almost all the thaumcraft addons and botania mod.

0 tech mod, 0 TC6-unrelated magic mod, 0 cheaty mod !

This pack ONLY have thaumcraft and it's addons, if you need more, please download them youself.

Use Thaumic Merger merged lots of addon's research to vanilla TC Page, say bye-bye to empty TC6-Research Page.

Returned Thaumic Tinkerer Kami-series, Forbidden Magic and Curtive Vat in Thaumic Horizons.

Fixed Planar Artifice, Crimson Revelations and Thaumic Bases Unofficial.

Impetus now can active a multiblock-smelter with 0 flux pollution.

Custom Item tooltip borders for each addons inspired by RL-tooltip borders.

A mysterious trinket called T12 let you ignore TC6's annoying research system.

Quests already available on English. (Thanks DJdemon3056)


Use Bauble mod from: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/baubles)

Use thaumcraft 6 mod from: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraft)

Use bibliocraft mod from: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bibliocraft)

Use Gravestone mod from: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gravestone-mod)


Also use Sonomagy as a nice soundpack: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sonomagy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sonomagy)
